Title: Verify successful sign-up process
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page.
2. Enter valid username, password, and email.
3. Click on the sign-up button.
4. System creates a new user account.
5. System redirects to the main menu.
Expected Result: A new user account is created, and the user is redirected to the main menu.

Title: Verify sign-up with invalid email
Test Data: Valid username, password, invalid email (e.g., missing @ symbol)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page.
2. Enter valid username and password.
3. Enter an invalid email (e.g., missing @ symbol).
4. Click on the sign-up button.
5. System displays an error message indicating invalid email format.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not redirected to the main menu.

Title: Verify successful login process
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter valid username and password.
3. Click on the login button.
4. System verifies the credentials.
5. System redirects to the main menu.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the main menu.

Title: Verify login with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter an invalid username or password.
3. Click on the login button.
4. System displays an error message indicating incorrect credentials.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not redirected to the main menu.

Title: Verify geolocation functionality during login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter valid username and password.
3. Enable geolocation and provide valid location coordinates.
4. Click on the login button.
5. System verifies the credentials and geolocation.
6. System redirects to the main menu.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in, geolocation is verified, and the user is redirected to the main menu.

Title: Verify successful creation of an announcement
Preconditions: User account already created and logged in
Test Data: Valid announcement details (title, description, location, price)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main menu.
2. Click on the "Create Announcement" option.
3. Enter valid announcement details.
4. Click on the submit button.
5. System creates the announcement.
6. System redirects to the announcement details page.
Expected Result: The announcement is successfully created, and the user is redirected to the announcement details page.

Title: Verify filtering of announcements based on location
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main menu.
2. Click on the "Filter Announcements" option.
3. Enter the location criteria.
4. Click on the filter button.
5. System filters the announcements based on the provided location.
6. System displays the filtered list of announcements.
Expected Result: The system filters the announcements based on the provided location, and the user sees the relevant announcements.

Title: Verify acceptance of an announcement
Test Data: Valid acceptance criteria (e.g., user ID, announcement ID)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main menu.
2. Click on the "Accept Announcement" option.
3. Enter the acceptance criteria.
4. Click on the accept button.
5. System verifies the acceptance criteria.
6. System marks the announcement as accepted.
7. System redirects to the announcement details page.
Expected Result: The announcement is marked as accepted, and the user is redirected to the announcement details page.

Title: Verify modification of an announcement
Preconditions: Announcement exists and user has permission to modify
Test Data: Updated announcement details (e.g., new title, description, price)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main menu.
2. Click on the "Modify Announcement" option.
3. Select the announcement to modify.
4. Enter updated announcement details.
5. Click on the save button.
6. System updates the announcement.
7. System redirects to the announcement details page.
Expected Result: The announcement is updated, and the user is redirected to the announcement details page.

Title: Verify deletion of an announcement
Preconditions: Announcement exists and user has permission to delete
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main menu.
2. Click on the "Delete Announcement" option.
3. Select the announcement to delete.
4. Confirm the deletion.
5. System deletes the announcement.
6. System redirects to the announcement list page.
Expected Result: The announcement is deleted, and the user is redirected to the announcement list page.

Title: Verify viewing of another user's profile
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main menu.
2. Click on the "View Profile" option.
3. Enter the profile ID of another user.
4. Click on the view button.
5. System displays the profile details of the other user.
Expected Result: The profile details of the other user are displayed.

Title: Verify modification of user account details
Test Data: Updated account details (e.g., new email, password)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main menu.
2. Click on the "Modify Account" option.
3. Enter updated account details.
4. Click on the save button.
5. System updates the account details.
6. System redirects to the main menu.
Expected Result: The user account details are updated, and the user is redirected to the main menu.

Title: Verify successful logout process
Preconditions: User account exists and is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main menu.
2. Click on the "Logout" option.
3. System logs the user out.
4. System redirects to the login page.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged out, and the system redirects to the login page.

Title: Verify creation of a noticeboard
Preconditions: User account exists and is logged in
Test Data: Valid noticeboard details (title, description, location, price)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main menu.
2. Click on the "Create Noticeboard" option.
3. Enter valid noticeboard details.
4. Click on the submit button.
5. System creates the noticeboard.
6. System redirects to the noticeboard details page.
Expected Result: The noticeboard is successfully created, and the user is redirected to the noticeboard details page.

Title: Verify filtering of noticeboards based on location
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main menu.
2. Click on the "Filter Noticeboard" option.
3. Enter the location criteria.
4. Click on the filter button.
5. System filters the noticeboards based on the provided location.
6. System displays the filtered list of noticeboards.
Expected Result: The system filters the noticeboards based on the provided location, and the user sees the relevant noticeboards.

Title: Verify booking of a noticeboard
Test Data: Valid booking criteria (e.g., noticeboard ID, user ID)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main menu.
2. Click on the "Book Noticeboard" option.
3. Enter the booking criteria.
4. Click on the book button.
5. System verifies the booking criteria.
6. System books the noticeboard.
7. System redirects to the booking confirmation page.
Expected Result: The noticeboard is booked, and the user is redirected to the booking confirmation page.

Title: Verify navigation to my activities
Preconditions: User account exists and is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main menu.
2. Click on the "My Activities" option.
3. System displays the user's activities.
